## Validation

- [ ] `pnpm run check`
- [ ] Browser QA not needed
- [ ] Browser QA completed using `docs/visual-qa.md`

## Scene/Layout Checklist

Complete this section when changing `src/scene`, `src/styles`, routes, navigation, or model assets.

- [ ] Home canvas is nonblank and GLB models load.
- [ ] Cat is visible at spawn and moves with keyboard controls.
- [ ] Destination proximity opens the correct popup/link.
- [ ] Reduced-motion fallback destination grid renders.
- [ ] Mobile header/nav/popup text does not overlap.
